hinglish_text: Metformin 500mg lene ke baad kamzori feel hoti hai
english_translation: I feel weak after taking metformin 500mg

hinglish_text: Pantoprazole le raha hun acidity ke liye, pet dard nahi hai
english_translation: Taking pantoprazole for acidity, no stomach pain

hinglish_text: Amlodipine use karne ke baad haath pair sujan gaye
english_translation: After using amlodipine my hands and feet swelled up

hinglish_text: Aspirin khane ke baad koi takleef nahi hui
english_translation: No problem occurred after taking aspirin

hinglish_text: Cetirizine li allergy ke liye, neend aa gayi din mein bhi
english_translation: Took cetirizine for allergy, got sleepy during the day too
